_comment: Discovery config for places_discover.py. Enumerates every business matching 'query' across 'towns' (a local service area), so you can prospect a trade for website-upgrade/creation services. type_keywords filter results down to genuine firms of that trade; companies with no website are flagged as prime leads. Copy to targets/<your-area>-discovery.json and edit.
area: Boulder County, CO — example service area (~30 min radius)
query: HVAC heating and air conditioning contractor
_normalize_comment: Used by normalize_prospects.py: 'chains' = national/large-regional brands (matched as case-insensitive substrings of the company name) tagged tier=chain; everything else tier=local. 'out_of_area_towns' = address towns clearly outside the footprint (informational in_footprint=false flag). 'microsite_adjectives' flag templated lead-gen microsites.
